title: MoreTool
description: Adds over 50 swords, tools, dimensions, mob loots, dungeons.
body:
**Adds over 50 swords, tools, dimensions, mob loots.**

![added swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709de8f6e06e0fb8a734e610aab262a3a233dba3.png)

**NOTE**: This mod has a JEI plugin. It can't show every possible combination, but it shows many examples

# Mob Loots
All entity : Soul of Sword (10%)\
Zombie : Ancient Ingot (5%)\
Spider : Bloody Ingot (5%)\
Skeleton : Pure Gold (5%)\
Enderman : Galaxy Ingot (10%)\
Drowned : Deep Sea Ingot (5%)\
Guardian : Deep Sea Ingot (5%)\
Stray : Frozen Ingot (10%)\
Creeper : Explosion Ingot (5%)
